items.name: Y2K Studded Gyaru Rhinestone Scene Belt Gold White
items.description:
𝕄𝕒𝕟𝕪 𝕠𝕥𝕙𝕖𝕣 𝕣𝕖𝕔𝕠𝕝𝕠𝕣𝕤 𝕒𝕣𝕖 𝕒𝕧𝕒𝕚𝕝𝕒𝕓𝕝𝕖 𝕚𝕟 𝕞𝕪 𝕘𝕣𝕠𝕦𝕡!
Join Group = https://www.roblox.com/communities/14477611

Turn heads with this stunning gold belt, adorned with dazzling white rhinestones and gems for the perfect McBling finish. Designed for the ultimate Y2K trendsetter, this belt embodies that bold scene and gyaru energy, blending luxurious gold with a touch of vintage 2000s glam. Whether you’re rocking a casual look or going all out with a statement outfit, this studded gold belt adds the perfect touch of elegance and edge. Shine bright and showcase your McBling style!
